name: Synthetic Construction Partner 01 – Entity Contractor National Infrastructure Turkmenistan
activities: Karakum Infrastructure AG is a Swiss-registered civil-engineering contractor. Its principal client is the Ministry of Construction of Turkmenistan, for which it builds highway sections and two railway bridges under contracts awarded in Ashgabat. Audited statements show that about 70% of the company's annual revenues come from these Turkmen government contracts; the remainder comes from private industrial buildings in Switzerland.
origin_of_assets: Company capital built from retained earnings of the contracting business.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Assets are dominated by plant, equipment and receivables from the Turkmen contracts.
